text: If you heat ice, it melts.
meaning: 如果你加热冰，它就融化。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you heat water, it boils.","zh":"如果你加热水，它就沸腾。"}]

text: If I don't sleep well, I feel tired the next day.
meaning: 如果我睡不好，第二天就觉得累。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I eat too much, I feel sick.","zh":"如果我吃太多，就觉得恶心。"}]

text: If you mix red and blue, you get purple.
meaning: 如果你把红色和蓝色混合，得到紫色。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you mix yellow and blue, you get green.","zh":"如果你混合黄和蓝，得到绿色。"}]

text: If it rains, the ground gets wet.
meaning: 如果下雨，地面就湿了。
examples_json: [{"en":"If it snows, everything turns white.","zh":"如果下雪，一切变白。"}]

text: If I am late, my boss gets angry.
meaning: 如果我迟到，老板会生气。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I don't call, my mom worries.","zh":"如果我不打电话，妈妈会担心。"}]

text: If you don't water plants, they die.
meaning: 如果你不给植物浇水，它们就死了。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you don't eat, you get hungry.","zh":"如果你不吃东西，就会饿。"}]

text: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.
meaning: 如果明天下雨，我就待在家。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I have time, I will help you.","zh":"如果我有时间，我会帮你。"}]

text: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
meaning: 如果你努力学习，你会通过考试。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you practice daily, you will improve.","zh":"如果你每天练习，就会进步。"}]

text: I will call you if I need help.
meaning: 如果我需要帮助，我会打给你。
examples_json: [{"en":"I will come if I can make it.","zh":"如果我能来，我就来。"}]

text: If you don't hurry, you will miss the bus.
meaning: 如果你不快点，会错过公交。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you don't leave now, you'll be late.","zh":"如果你现在不走，会迟到。"}]

text: She won't get the job if she doesn't prepare well.
meaning: 如果她不好好准备，就得不到工作。
examples_json: [{"en":"He won't succeed if he doesn't try.","zh":"如果他不尝试，就不会成功。"}]

text: If he arrives early, we can start the meeting sooner.
meaning: 如果他早到，我们可以早点开会。
examples_json: [{"en":"If everyone is ready, we can begin.","zh":"如果大家都准备好了，我们可以开始。"}]

text: If I had more money, I would travel around the world.
meaning: 如果我有更多钱，我会环游世界。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I had a car, I would drive to work.","zh":"如果我有车，我就开车上班。"}]

text: If I were you, I would accept the offer.
meaning: 如果我是你，我会接受这个提议。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I were you, I would take the job.","zh":"如果我是你，我会接受这份工作。"}]

text: If she knew the truth, she would be very sad.
meaning: 如果她知道真相，她会很伤心。
examples_json: [{"en":"If he knew, he would be angry.","zh":"如果他知道，他会生气。"}]

text: I would buy a house if I had enough money.
meaning: 如果我有足够的钱，我会买房子。
examples_json: [{"en":"I would travel if I had more vacation.","zh":"如果我有更多假期，我会去旅行。"}]

text: If he lived closer, he could visit us more often.
meaning: 如果他住得近，他可以更常来看我们。
examples_json: [{"en":"If we had a car, we could go camping.","zh":"如果我们有车，可以去露营。"}]

text: If I had a better job, I might move to a bigger city.
meaning: 如果我有更好的工作，我可能会搬到大城市。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I knew the answer, I might tell you.","zh":"如果我知道答案，我可能会告诉你。"}]

text: If I had studied harder, I would have passed the exam.
meaning: 如果我更努力学习，我就通过考试了。
examples_json: [{"en":"If I had prepared more, I would have done better.","zh":"如果我准备更多，会做得更好。"}]

text: If she had left earlier, she wouldn't have missed the train.
meaning: 如果她早点出发，就不会错过火车。
examples_json: [{"en":"If he had woken up earlier, he wouldn't have been late.","zh":"如果他早点醒，就不会迟到。"}]

text: If we had saved more money, we could have bought a house.
meaning: 如果我们多存点钱，就能买房了。
examples_json: [{"en":"If we had invested, we could have made money.","zh":"如果我们投资了，就能赚钱。"}]

text: I would have called you if I had known you were sick.
meaning: 如果我知道你生病了，我就打给你了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I would have come if I had known.","zh":"如果我知道，我就来了。"}]

text: If he had taken the medicine, he might have recovered sooner.
meaning: 如果他吃了药，他可能恢复得更快。
examples_json: [{"en":"If he had listened, he might have avoided the problem.","zh":"如果他听了，可能避免了问题。"}]

text: If they had asked for help, I would have been happy to assist.
meaning: 如果他们请求帮助，我会很乐意帮忙的。
examples_json: [{"en":"If they had told me, I would have helped.","zh":"如果他们告诉我，我会帮忙的。"}]

text: I wish I were taller.
meaning: 我希望我更高一点。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I were richer.","zh":"我希望我更有钱。"}]

text: I wish I lived near the beach.
meaning: 我希望我住在海边。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I had a car.","zh":"我希望有辆车。"}]

text: She wishes she had more time to travel.
meaning: 她希望有更多时间旅行。
examples_json: [{"en":"He wishes he knew the answer.","zh":"他希望他知道答案。"}]

text: I wish it would stop raining.
meaning: 我希望雨能停。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish they would hurry up.","zh":"我希望他们快点。"}]

text: I wish I had studied harder in school.
meaning: 我希望我上学时更努力学习。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I had listened to my parents.","zh":"我希望我听了父母的话。"}]

text: She wishes she hadn't said that.
meaning: 她希望她没说过那句话。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I hadn't eaten so much.","zh":"我希望我没吃那么多。"}]

text: I wish I could go with you, but I can't.
meaning: 我希望我能和你一起去，但我不能。
examples_json: [{"en":"I wish I could help, but I'm busy.","zh":"我希望我能帮忙，但我很忙。"}]

text: If only I had known the truth earlier!
meaning: 要是我早知道真相就好了！
examples_json: [{"en":"If only I had listened!","zh":"要是我听了就好了！"}]

text: I won't go unless you come with me.
meaning: 除非你跟我一起去，否则我不去。
examples_json: [{"en":"I won't call unless it's urgent.","zh":"除非紧急，否则我不打电话。"}]

text: You can't enter unless you have a ticket.
meaning: 除非你有票，否则不能入场。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can't join unless you're invited.","zh":"除非受到邀请，否则不能参加。"}]

text: You can borrow my car as long as you drive carefully.
meaning: 只要你小心开，就可以借我的车。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can stay as long as you keep quiet.","zh":"只要你保持安静，就可以留下。"}]

text: I'll go provided that everyone else agrees.
meaning: 只要其他人都同意，我就去。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll help provided that you pay me.","zh":"只要你付钱，我就帮忙。"}]

text: I'll still love you even if you make mistakes.
meaning: 即使你犯错，我仍然爱你。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll finish even if it takes all night.","zh":"即使需要一整晚，我也会完成。"}]

text: Hurry up, otherwise we'll be late.
meaning: 快点，否则我们要迟到了。
examples_json: [{"en":"Study hard, otherwise you'll fail.","zh":"努力学习，否则你会不及格。"}]

text: I'd better leave now, otherwise I'll miss the train.
meaning: 我最好现在走，否则赶不上火车。
examples_json: [{"en":"We should leave now, otherwise we'll hit traffic.","zh":"我们现在该走了，否则会堵车。"}]

text: Whether you like it or not, we have to do it.
meaning: 不管你喜欢与否，我们都得做。
examples_json: [{"en":"Whether you agree or not, I'll go.","zh":"不管你是否同意，我都会去。"}]
